name: тАЛManyRequests
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What ManyRequests Does

ManyRequests is the "cleaner" cousin of AgencyHandy. It is widely considered the top choice for agencies moving away from "custom work" and into "subscriptions.тАЭ тАЛIt gives you a sleek, white-labeled portal where clients can submit requests, see their files, and manage their recurring billing. ItтАЩs very popular for design and content agencies.

Source: ManyRequests

тАЛKey Features

ЁЯПЖ White-Label Client Portal: High-end look with your own domain and logo.

ЁЯПЖ Request Management: Clients "spend" their subscription credits or hours through a ticketing system.

тАЛЁЯПЖ Onboarding Workflows: Automated forms that trigger the moment a recurring payment is confirmed.

тАЛBenefits of ManyRequests

тАЛIt makes your agency look like a software company. The "Modern Portal" feel justifies higher retainers because the client feels they are getting a "premium" tech-enabled service.

тАЛPricing

  • тАЛStarter: $29/mo
  • тАЛCore: $59/mo
  • тАЛPro: $99/mo (includes full white-labeling)

There are also discounts available when choosing to bill annually.

тАЛPros

тАЛтЬЕ Extremely polished UI/UX for the client.

тЬЕ Handles "unlimited" request models perfectly.

тАЛCons

тАЛЁЯЪл Can get expensive quickly as you add team seats.

ЁЯЪл No "lead generation" or CRM tools built in.

тАН

тАЛWhat Customers Say

тАЛ"It has almost all the customization options we require, time tracking, checklists, ticketing, and feedback from our clients."

тАУ Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
